name: Jam French Toast Triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread preserves on three bread slices.
2. Top with the remaining bread slices to make sandwiches, pressing to seal.
3. Cut each sandwich diagonally in half.
4. In a shallow bowl, combine egg beaters and milk.
5. Dip each sandwich in the egg mixture to coat.
6. In a large skillet or griddle over medium-high heat, brown the sandwiches in margarine until golden brown on both sides.
7. Combine sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over sandwiches.
